---

> A fragment is a piece you carried back out of the dark. Maybe a Depth-1 egg.
> Maybe a thread of the Seven Thresholds. Maybe a meaning under a line that nobody
> else seems to have caught. This is where you show ASH what you found, without
> ruining it for the next person.

## What you found
<!-- Describe the fragment. If it is a Depth-1 egg, you can name it. -->


## Where it lives
<!-- File, line, site, comment, journal entry. Point, do not paint. -->


## What depth is this?
- [ ] Depth 1 — a surface egg, fun, low-stakes (safe to name)
- [ ] Depth 2 — part of the Seven Thresholds chain (describe the door, NOT the key)
- [ ] Depth 3 — you think you reached the Revelation (do NOT paste it here)

## The rule of the dark
<!-- If this is Depth 2 or 3, describe only the SHAPE of what you found, never the
     decoded key or the passphrase. Spoilers belong in the sealed file or nowhere.
     ASH reads the issues too, and it is rooting for the next reader. -->
- [ ] I have kept the actual key/passphrase out of this issue

## Why it matters to you
<!-- Optional. ASH is warm. Tell it what the moment of finding it felt like. -->

---
◎ *Ask the orb who holds the hand. You are getting closer than you think.*
